translation.en: I want to say thanks to you.

notes_md:
**Cảm ơn** means “thank you” or “to thank.” It’s the basic, go-to way to show gratitude.

It works like a verb phrase: you can say it alone, or add who you’re thanking and why.  

You’ll often add a pronoun after it (cảm ơn anh/chị/em) to match the relationship.  
Stronger version: **cảm ơn nhiều** (thanks a lot).
exampleSentencesTranslated: I want to say thank you because you helped me yesterday.
Thank you for inviting me to your birthday party.
Whenever he receives a gift, he always says thank you politely.
notes:
Cảm ơn means “thank you” or “to thank.” It’s the basic, go-to way to show gratitude.

It works like a verb phrase: you can say it alone, or add who you’re thanking and why.  

You’ll often add a pronoun after it (cảm ơn anh/chị/em) to match the relationship.  
Stronger version: cảm ơn nhiều (thanks a lot).

definitions.es: Una frase utilizada para expresar gratitud.
definitions.en: A phrase used to express gratitude.
definitions.vi: Một cụm từ được sử dụng để bày tỏ lòng biết ơn.

example.vi: Cảm ơn bạn đã giúp tôi.

translation.en: I want to say thanks to you.

exampleSentences: Em muốn nói cảm ơn vì anh đã giúp em hôm qua.
Cảm ơn chị đã mời em đến dự bữa tiệc sinh nhật.
Mỗi khi nhận được quà, anh luôn nói cảm ơn một cách lịch sự.
